title: Ireland lags EU peers on clinical trials despite rise in activity [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Pharmaceutical industry calls for structural reforms as Dublin ranked slowest in bloc for trial start-up times, and 14th out of 27 for per capita clinical trial activity in 2025
summary_public: Pharmaceutical industry calls for structural reforms as Dublin ranked slowest in bloc for trial start-up times, and 14th out of 27 for per capita clinical trial activity in 2025

IE.label: negative
IE.evidence: Ireland lags EU peers on clinical trials despite rise in activity
